title: Indemnification of officers, directors, employees, and agents; insurance
doc_html:
§83.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1970, No. 50, §5, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M.; Acts 1986, No. 561, §1, eff. July 2, 1986; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§83.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1970, No. 50, §5, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M.; Acts 1986, No. 561, §1, eff. July 2, 1986; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
